visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair tied back in a ponytail appears in a medium shot, wearing a light blue camisole. She holds a small grey microphone and speaks excitedly with expressive facial movements. The setting is a brightly lit, modern white room with soft shadows. (2) The scene cuts to a wider indoor studio space where the woman is seen with two other female makeup artists. They are standing in front of shelves and tables filled with various beauty products and artwork. One artist wears a white lab coat style shirt and glasses. (3) A high-detail close-up shot shows a hand pressing the pump of a red and white bottle. A small amount of beige creamy liquid is dispensed onto a silver metal mixing palette. The lighting is bright and professional, emphasizing the product's texture. (4) A series of close-up shots show a makeup brush and sponge applying foundation to the woman's face. The skin appears moist and reflective under the studio lights. Bright yellow and white text overlays provide detailed product information on the left side. (5) A close-up displays a luxury gold-toned highlight compact. Hands apply the shimmering powder to the woman's nose bridge and cheekbones using fingers. The lighting captures the high-shine glow effect on her skin as she turns her head slightly. (6) A close-up shows a bottle of pink nail polish being opened. A hand is then placed inside a white UV nail lamp labeled with a brand logo, emitting a blue light. The final shot shows the woman waving through a mirror reflection.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 今天來拍. [Slogan]: 專業彩妝師近期愛用三選. (2) [Subtitle]: 恭喜禾院工作室. 我是高雄的小珍. 恭喜台南的蔡. 我們今天推薦都跟光澤有關. 因為光澤就是最顯年輕顯可愛加分的產品. (3) [Subtitle]: 哇你真的很愛用. 真的快用完了. [Variety]: (空空如也). (4) [Logo]: 資生堂 / 超聚光活膚粉底精華. (5) [Subtitle]: 因為它的底妝很輕薄, 水潤度很強, 底妝遮瑕力不會太高, 所以就不會變得過分厚重的感覺. (6) [Subtitle]: 哇我的臉看起來現在氣色之好. 熟練肌也適合. 欸我還不... [Variety]: (???). [Slogan]: 我們是17歲. [Variety]: ha ha. (7) [Logo]: 肌膚之鑰 / 精質光耀幻妍餅. (8) [Subtitle]: 本人已購入. 提亮的話我會先從鼻子開始把它化開, 它的光澤很強, 然後就會讓鼻子看起來翹翹的, 我們一樣會放到我們的顴骨, 一樣把它化開, 轉折的時候就會有一個光點. (9) [Logo]: Homei / 光療系列. (10) [Subtitle]: 這是你們近期愛用的光療. 一次30秒. 我們照兩次1分鐘. 哇你看這個它的光澤它的亮度也夠. 它是可剝式的. 它還沒照光之前你塗錯了你只要拿衛生紙擦掉就好. 缺點就是容易掉. [Variety]: (可維持1-2天). (11) [Subtitle]: 希望大家喜歡這支影片. 下次見耶.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 2 female makeup artists featured in the studio.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue camisole/tank top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a bright indoor room with white walls and soft lighting. It then moves to a professional makeup studio with shelves of beauty products, paintings, and mirrors with ring lights.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a female voice speaking in a friendly, high-energy tone with clear and rapid speech patterns. Background music is a light, acoustic guitar-driven pop track with a moderate tempo and major-mode tonality. (2) A sharp hard cut triggers a new phase. Two additional female voices join the conversation, exhibiting high pitch variability and playful, excited intonations. Light group laughter is heard in the background as the BGM continues steadily. (3) A distinct 'ding' sound effect marks the presentation of the first beauty product. The primary narrator provides technical details with high articulation clarity and a professional, informative tone. Subtle incidental rustling of makeup tools is faintly audible. (4) A 'whoosh' SFX transition introduces the next segment. The speaker's tone remains animated and positive, with rising intonations. The acoustic texture is clean, suggesting a well-produced indoor studio environment with minimal ambient noise floor interference. (5) A cartoonish 'pop' and 'ha-ha' sound effect accompanies a humorous remark. The vocal intensity increases briefly during group laughter before returning to a moderate conversational level for product demonstrations. The BGM maintains a balanced volume throughout. (6) The video concludes with the narrator's warm sign-off. The speech rate slows down for emphasis on the final greeting. The background music volume swells slightly before a smooth fade-out as the video ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item 1 -> Item 2 -> Item 3 -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to recommend three specific professional-grade beauty products—a Shiseido foundation, a Clé de Peau Beauté highlighter, and HOMEI peel-off nail polish—by showcasing their application effects and personal endorsements from makeup artists to attract beauty enthusiasts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently features branded products with high-praise descriptions and on-screen product labels, presented as 'makeup artist favorites'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-arousal vocal delivery and fast-paced editing with trendy sound effects to maintain viewer engagement throughout the product recommendations.
